headline: Peter Moores To Lead Raymond James Canada As Valuation Gap Persists
summary: Raymond James Financial (NYSE:RJF) has named Peter Moores as the next CEO of Raymond James Ltd., its Canadian business. The appointment is subject to regulatory approval and represents an internal promotion for Moores. The change affects leadership for the firm’s Canadian wealth management and capital markets operations. Raymond James Financial, through Raymond James Ltd., operates a broad Canadian platform that includes wealth management, investment banking, and related capital markets...
